entities.name: Zo
entities.context: AI system that starts completely bare and requires explicit rules for access

entities.name: Bare System Design
entities.context: Design philosophy of starting a system with no implicit permissions, requiring explicit rules

entities.name: Explicit Access Rules
entities.context: Requirement that all AI operations be governed by user-defined rules

entities.name: Black Box Software
entities.context: Traditional software paradigm where internal operations are hidden from users

entities.name: User Control and Visibility
entities.context: Principle that users should have total control and transparency over AI operations

relationships.context: Zo implements the bare system approach by starting with no implicit access
Bare systems require explicit rules to grant any access
Starting bare enables total user control over AI operations
